mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.role_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1
SELECT DISTINCT m.permission FROM sys_user_menu um INNER JOIN sys_menu m ON um.menu_id = m.id WHERE um.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1
